data.title: Haier Celebrates Excellence in Paris With New Smart Home Portfolio
data.description: Haier, a top IoT brand focused on providing high-quality consumer experiences, recently organized the exclusive Champions Meeting in Paris on March 27, 2026. This event brought together global partners, customers, and international media. Haier's dedication to the European market was a central theme of the gathering, highlighting its commitment to fostering strong connections with stakeholders worldwide.

data.title: Icelandic Salmon - Annual Report 2025
data.description: Icelandic Salmon AS, listed on Euronext Growth Oslo and First North Iceland under the ticker symbol ISLAX, released its comprehensive Annual Report for 2025. The report includes sustainability disclosures along with detailed annual financial statements comprising all pertinent notes.

data.title: ARK Invest collaborates with Kalshi for investment decisions, focusing on non-farm payroll & deficit-to-GDP ratio markets.
data.description: Kalshi has identified particular markets that have piqued the interest of ARK Invest, including non-farm payroll markets and deficit-to-GDP ratio markets.ARK Invest is closely monitoring these markets for potential investment opportunities.

data.title: New bill targets prediction market insider trading by banning gov't officials from using inside information, with fines up to double profits.
data.description: A new bill has been introduced to prevent government officials from utilizing confidential information to make bets on prediction market contracts. According to the proposed legislation, fines for violators could reach up to twice the profits gained from such activities. This initiative aims to promote transparency and ethical behavior among public servants, ensuring fair practices in financial dealings.

data.title: Updated Cholesterol Guideline Shifts Focus to Lifelong Prevention
data.description: As of March 27, 2026, latest national recommendations on lipid management are focusing on proactive risk assessment, tailored treatment plans, and extended prevention measures. The guidelines suggest personalized interventions and potential treatment initiation as early as 30 years old. This strategy aims to address cholesterol and other blood lipid issues more effectively, offering improved long-term health outcomes.

data.title: GAC Marks SOP and AION UT Roll-Off in Austria, Advancing European Localized Cooperation with Magna
data.description: In Graz, Austria, on March 18, 2026, GAC achieved a significant milestone in its European growth by commencing production and releasing its AION UT model at Magna's plant. The AION UT plays a vital role in GAC's strategy for localization, marking a key step in its expansion plans in the region.

data.title: Nidec Announces the Future Nomination of Director Candidates for New Nidec
data.description: In an effort to enhance corporate governance, Nidec Corporation in Japan is adjusting its Board of Directors based on the recommendations of the Third-Party Committee's March 3 report and the Improvement Plan and Status Report released on January 28. The company seeks to strengthen the Board's effectiveness by appointing directors with varied knowledge, experience, and skills. This move comes in the wake of the company's commitment to improving governance and transparency.

data.title: Southland Holdings (SLND) Stock Plunges Over 30% As Rally Loses Steam: What's Going On?
data.description: Southland Holdings Inc. witnessed a significant decline in after-hours trading on Thursday, dropping by 32.92% to $1.08 post the disclosure of its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results. The stock had finished the regular session at $1.61, marking a 21.97% rise. Southland Holdings operates as a U.S.-based infrastructure construction firm, specializing in intricate projects like bridges, tunnels, marine works, and water systems for large public and private clients. The company had recently experienced a boost of over 50% following the announcement of $118 million in new contracts, which included a $48 million data center project and additional water infrastructure deals. Nevertheless, the positive outlook was overshadowed by the subsequent downturn in sentiment.
